channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo says consistency of his work ethic helped him join 20,000-point club
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo believes his latest milestone should serve as a testament to his consistent work ethic.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Stanford loses 56-54 heartbreaker to Notre Dame on Cole Certa’s 3-pointer with 18 seconds left
item.description: Maxime Raynaud had 20 points and 10 rebounds for Stanford, which concludes its regular season on Saturday at No. 14 Louisville.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: CMU Swimming is ready to chase their first National Championship
item.description: If there was ever a year for Colorado Mesa Swimming and Diving to bring home the program's first-ever national championship, this is the year.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: St. Thomas is rising with rare D3-D1 jump. NCAA postseason ban makes Summit tourney the present peak
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — One of the highest-scoring teams in the country has 22 wins, the No. 2 seed for its conference tournament — and no place to play after that. For the University of St. Thomas, the accelerated transition to full-fledged NCAA Division I member is almost over.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chase Briscoe wins appeal over modified spoiler during Daytona 500 pole-winning run
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chase Briscoe and Joe Gibbs Racing won their appeal Wednesday when the National Motorsports Appeals Panel said his Toyota did not have an illegally modified spoiler when he won the Daytona 500 pole.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NASCAR countersues 23XI and Front Row, as well as Michael Jordan's manager, in dispute over charters
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR's revenue-sharing charter system is under threat of being disbanded, according to a Wednesday counterclaim filed by the stock car series against Michael Jordan-owned 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports that singles out Jordan's longtime business manager.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A record $100 million donation will give next gen of US Olympians $100K to spend after they retire
item.description: The U.S. Olympic team received its biggest donation ever — $100 million — to fund $100,000 payments and matching life insurance benefits for anyone who earns a spot on Team USA starting next year. The donation to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Mets have spent more in Steve Cohen's 4 years than Marlins, Pirates and Rays over the past 21
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Mets led the major leagues in spending for the third straight season in 2024 and have totaled $1.36 billion in payroll and luxury tax over four years under owner Steve Cohen, exceeding what the Marlins, Pirates and Rays each have spent on players in the past 21 seasons.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Emma Raducanu says she struggled to breathe after seeing 'fixated' man in the crowd
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Emma Raducanu says she “couldn't see the ball through tears” and struggled to breathe after spotting a man who was “fixated” on her during a match. The British tennis player and 2021 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: WNBA champion invests in Bay Area sports franchise
item.description: (KRON) – WNBA champion and Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu was announced as an investor and commercial advisor for the Bay Football Club. Ionescu, who is also a three-time All-Star and Olympic gold medalist, announced her involvement with Bay FC on Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Goalie of the future? Spencer Knight makes 41 saves, backstops Blackhawks to win over Kings in debut with team
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN, AP) — Spencer Knight was once considered the goaltender of the future for one NHL franchise. Now he plans to make a case as the goaltender of the future for another, and he got right to work with the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 1A, 2A, 3A, 4A basketball brackets are out, as 5A & 6A Sweet 16s are set
item.description: Postseason basketball has officially ramped up and is in full swing. Here is where every local team stands.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Foul! Cavaliers guard Ty Jerome blasts officials after whistle-happy crew calls 53 fouls
item.description: Upset with an inordinate number of personals called during Cleveland's 133-129 overtime win against Portland on Sunday, Jerome didn't hold back in criticizing the officiating crew — zeroing in on referee Natalie Sago.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Joe Highsmith goes from making the cut to a PGA Tour winner at the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Joe Highsmith could feel himself crumbling under the pressure at the Cognizant Classic. This was on Friday, when the only thing at stake was making the cut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC's historic home opener draws record crowd
item.description: Fans were buzzing with excitement as San Diego FC kicked off their inaugural MLS home opener against St. Louis City SC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 73, Cathedral 61
item.description:
Carlsbad basketball had a repeat on its mind: a goal to get back to the Open Division title game.
Consider it mission accomplished after a 73 to 61 win over a hard charging Cathedral team.
Jett Kenady was the difference for the Lancers on Tuesday night, scoring 24 points. Jake Hall added 22.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Utes lose to Arizona in Josh Eilert's debut, 83-66
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - It was nearly an impossible task for the Runnin' Utes Wednesday night in their first game under interim head coach Josh Eilert. In his first game since Craig Smith was fired, Eilert's Utes got blown out by #22 Arizona, 83-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
